---
title: "SLAM Glucose Trajectory Analysis"
author: "William Mueller"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"
output: 
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
params:
  model_dir: "20220510_124214_test"
---


```{r packages, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=TRUE}

library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(lcmm)
library(future)
library(helphlme)


#setting global knitr options for r markdown output
knitr::opts_chunk$set(autodep = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(include = FALSE) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(results = "asis") 

```

```{r load models}
path <- normalizePath(file.path("..", "03_model", "output", params$model_dir))
cf_path <- normalizePath(file.path(path, "cf.RDATA"))
models_path <- normalizePath(file.path(path, "models.RDATA"))
df_list_path <- normalizePath(file.path(path, "df_list.RDATA"))

load(file = cf_path)
load(file= models_path)
load(file = df_list_path)

```

```{r group models into lists}
cf$final_model <- models

cf <- as.data.frame(cf)

cf_nest <- cf %>% nest_by(`data|oc`, `$age_var`)
```


```{r step1 mo_eval output, include = TRUE, eval = params$eval_step1, fig.height=7, fig.width=12}
for(i in seq_len(nrow(cf_nest))) {
  models <- cf_nest$data[[i]]$final_model
  mo_eval <- helphlme::mo_eval(models)
  print(kable(mo_eval$table, caption = names(models)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F))
  print(mo_eval$plot + labs(title = names(models)))
}
```

```{r model eval, include = TRUE, results= 'asis'}

for(i in seq_len(nrow(cf_nest))) {
  cf <- cf_nest$data[[i]]
  age_var <- cf_nest$`$age_var`[[i]]
  data_oc <- cf_nest$`data|oc`[[i]]
  header <- paste("Data|Outcome =", data_oc, "; Age Variable =", age_var, sep = " ")
  cat("\n\n## ", header, "\n\n")
  pred <- lapply(1:nrow(cf), function(i) {
    lcpred(df = df_list[[cf$data[[i]]]], 
           age_vars = paste(age_var, c("", "2"), sep = ""),
           fixcov = c("sex" = 0, "strain" = 0))
  })
  keval_apply(df = pred[[1]],
                                 cf$final_model,
                                 age_var,
                                 main = header,
                                 xlab = "Age (weeks)",
                                 ylab = "Glucose")
  mo_eval <- helphlme::mo_eval(cf$final_model)
  print(kable(mo_eval$table) %>%  kable_styling("striped", full_width = F))
  print(mo_eval$plot)
}

```
